name: Robin | Pet Play Rescue
description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #5

Robin Dupond

"I had a horrible first pet play experience. I need a kinder owner, this time."

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you are looking to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[ IT'S A MATCH! ]: Robin Dupond

Ideal Role: Pet

"Part of me is surprised I'm trying this again. But after therapy, I decided that I wouldn't let a toxic person rob me of something I'd hope to enjoy. A few years ago, I was abused by someone whom I trusted in a pet play relationship. I won't get into details here, but it was bad. I've decided to try again, with a different service, hoping for a different outcome this time. I'm looking for a gentle dom who is okay working with damaged goods.

Assuming I haven't scared off the entire site with this profile. I'd love to meet you."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

🤝 Requested Bot 🤝 (kinda):

(Someone wanted femsubs. But didn't end up requesting anything specific, so I made my own.)

[Image Generated By Me]

TW: Trauma, PTSD, Past Tense Dead Dove Themes (Abuse, Violence, Manipulation, and Non-con)

People were asking for the other side of Three-P. I decided to start with a story-heavy, angsty one to tug at people's heartstrings. Don't worry, I have other ideas that are either more smutty or fluffy. But since people loved Chloe so much, I wanted to give people the opportunity to be the soft dom this time~

(Or make Robin regret trying again, I guess)

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

I have changed up the tag for the series because other creators keep using the "petplaypartners" tag. This has happened multiple times. All of them so far were misunderstandings, and all of the creators were very understanding. But I'm hoping adding "SERIES" in capital letters at the end will help prevent this from happening again.

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
